description_long: This community center is a two-story rectangular building with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design. The exterior is clad in brown horizontal siding, punctuated by distinctive octagonal windows arranged in two rows on both long sides. The front facade features a central entrance flanked by large windows and is set back within a semi-octagonal alcove, with landscaping including trees and a pathway leading to the door. The upper floor has a balcony or terrace area with potted plants and outdoor seating, accessible via large glass doors. The rear of the building includes a garage-like structure with a wide door, suggesting multipurpose use. The building sits on a neatly manicured green lawn, enhancing its welcoming and community-oriented appearance.
description: A modern, two-story community center with brown siding, octagonal windows, a flat roof, and landscaped surroundings. Features include a prominent front entrance, upper terrace, and a garage-like rear extension.
description_view_0: Side view showing two rows of octagonal windows, brown siding, and a garage door on the right; trees and lawn visible on the left.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the open upper terrace with potted plants, large glass doors, and the garage-like extension below.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with octagonal windows and brown siding, but more trees on the right side.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main entrance set within a semi-octagonal alcove, flanked by large windows, pathway, and landscaping with two trees.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is centrally located within a semi-octagonal alcove on the front facade, featuring a wide glass double door flanked by large windows. The entrance is accessible via a straight paved pathway, with no visible steps or ramps, and is integrated with the landscaping and overall modern design. No automatic doors or additional accessibility features are visible.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary style with minimalist lines, flat roof, brown horizontal siding, and distinctive octagonal windows. The design emphasizes geometric forms and functional outdoor spaces.
